name: Bobby Battle
abstract: Bobby Battle (January 8, 1944 – December 6, 2019 in Detroit)  was an American jazz drummer. Occasionally, he played the saxophone.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Sam Rivers Quartet and Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Lundy
about_quotes.evidence: And I did that for a year. So I’m all over. ... it was an organ trio. And I can tell you it was Roland Prince on guitar and Don Pullen on organ, Bucky Thorpe on flugelhorn and Bobby Battle from Detroit on drums.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Lundy interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 15, 2023
